title: Sweetly Aromatic Saudi-Arabian Dates Tagine
description: A rich and comforting Tagine dish from Saudi-Arabia featuring soft dates, dark sugar, and fragrant spices. This dessert is perfect for a date night or a cozy evening with friends.
instructions: In a small bowl, mix together the cardamom, cinnamon, allspice, and salt.
In a large Tagine or Dutch oven, combine the pitted dates, dark brown sugar, coconut milk, ghee or oil, and spice mixture.
Stir until the sugar dissolves and the mixture is well combined.
Cover the Tagine or Dutch oven with a lid and transfer it to the preheated oven.
Bake for 25 minutes or until the dates are tender and the sauce is bubbly.
Remove the Tagine or Dutch oven from the oven and let it cool slightly.
Serve the sweet and pillowy dates Tagine warm, garnished with chopped nuts or dried rose petals if desired.
Serve immediately and enjoy the sweet aroma of this traditional Saudi-Arabian dessert.
